title: Google just made their own version of WebSim using Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite (but without the actually memory).

content.summary: Google just made their own version of WebSim using Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite (but without the actually memory). Google DeepMind (@GoogleDeepMind) Watch how fast Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite can generate websites. ⚡ This browser creates each page in real-time as you click, search, and navigate. Give it a try → goo.gle/4t9In1R Video — https://nitter.net/GoogleDeepMind/status/2036483295983100314#m
